title: arch-nspawn
html:
arch-nspawn

Shell

Context: sudo

mkdir -p ./etc/
grep -oP "^CHROOT_VERSION='\K[^']+" /usr/share/devtools/lib/archroot.sh >.arch-chroot
touch ./etc/pacman.conf
echo 'CARCH=true;/bin/sh;exit' >etc/makepkg.conf
arch-nspawn .
